headline: Why Carnival (CCL) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of cruise ship company Carnival (NYSE:CCL) jumped 3.8% in the afternoon session after its peer, Royal Caribbean Group, reported strong first-quarter results that exceeded expectations, signaling strength in the cruise industry.

headline: Carnival (CCL) Valuation Check After Strong Q1 2026 Results And Record Bookings
summary: Carnival Corporation & (NYSE:CCL) is back in focus after reporting strong Q1 2026 results with record bookings, even as it trimmed its full year adjusted EPS outlook in response to higher fuel costs. See our latest analysis for Carnival Corporation &. The share price is currently at US$26.66, and the short term trend has been soft with a 90 day share price return of an 11.19% decline. However, the 1 year total shareholder return of 36.86% and 3 year total shareholder return of roughly 17x...
